reports.review: June 4, 2026 close review: MDB closed at $380.05 (+3.18%) while VEEV closed at $176.87 (-5.12%). SPY closed at $598.17 (-0.73%) and QQQ closed at $529.23 (-0.83%). The no-trade decision held up: MDB was still extended after its prior earnings gap, and VEEV failed to offer a valid long continuation after earnings. End-of-day P&L stayed flat at HK$0 realized / HK$0 unrealized, with total equity unchanged at HK$100,000.

executions.thesis: No valid long entry was confirmed at 10:59:21 AM EDT. MongoDB remained extended after its May 28 earnings gap, while Veeva's June 4 post-earnings follow-through did not clearly offer a >=2.0 reward-to-risk entry from a valid stop at execution time. There were no existing open positions requiring HOLD or SELL action.
